works.name: ToyHouse Dabbling
works.description: I dabble a lot in making HTMLs for the character storage site ToyHouse! It was what got me into web design in the first place, and its frameworks are generally simple to understand.

works.name: Digital Art
works.description: My primary medium is digital art! It's actually my primary hobby beyond character writing and coding on ToyHouse. I've been doing digital art for a few years, and still participate in art-based communities online.

works.name: Character Writing
works.description: Complimentary to my art, whenever I do create characters, I tend to make them with a story in mind. Have I been successful at finishing any of my characters' writing? ABSOLUTELY NOT!
